Alright guys, it is finally time to make our ads. The first thing that you're going to want to check is that you actually are set up inside of your ads manager with your correct ad account. So the correct one will be the one that is hooked up to your pixel and your custom conversion. So once you've selected that account, go ahead and click on the create button. My creation button is going to immediately load me up into quick creation. If you're given the option between quick and guided, go ahead and choose quick so you can follow along. The campaign name can really be whatever you want it to be. I'm going to call mine 42-day detox because that's the funnel I'm using and then August so I know the month that the campaign started. Our buying type is going to be auction and our campaign objective is going to be conversions because we're going to hook it up to that custom conversion we created in the last video. From here, you'll select campaign budget optimization. You will sometimes hear us tech people call it CBO. So this is what we're talking about. And then for the daily budget, we're going to put in $60. So this is going to correlate to $5 in ad and we'll be running 12 ads. From here, I'm going to create a new ad set. So I'm going to call it female template mobile. I'm going to give my ad a similar name. Female ad mobile. And go ahead and click save to draft. This is going to pop up all three levels of the campaign. The largest level being the campaign, moving on to the ad set and then the ad. Our ad set is going to be where we set up our demographic and who we want to reach out to. So for the conversion event, we're going to choose our custom conversion that we created in the last video. Because the whole purpose of our campaign is to get them to fill out that pop up and set up an appointment and become a lead. We're going to scroll all the way down to audience. And then enter in our address for our location. So we want to make sure that everyone in this location is going to see what we enter for ad. So go ahead and type in your address. And then we're going to do a seven mile radius. When you click on the radius button, make sure that when you enter in your seven miles that you hit the enter button and don't just click away. Because if you just click away, it won't work. Let me show you what I'm talking about. So if I were to type in 700 miles and click away, still says seven. From here, because this is our female template, we'll choose women as our gender. And then our age ranges are going to be from 23. 55. We're going to scroll down all the way to placements and then click edit placement. And then for the device that we're going to be advertising to it's going to be mobile. So you're going to want to uncheck desktop. For the platform, we're only going to do a Facebook campaign. We found that this tends to have the highest return and best value compared to the others on the placements themselves. We're only going to check Facebook newsfeed and instant articles. Make sure that you're actually reading the check boxes and not just following along as I uncheck things. Because that instant articles is something that tends to move around in the different versions of Facebook. And we can't guarantee that you and I have the same version. My an article is located right here. So I have my instant articles. Good to go. And then the next thing we have to do in our ad set is optimization and delivery. So our conversion window should be one day click. And after that, we've created our female template for our ad set. So the next thing we're going to do is travel down to the ad level. This is going to be where your identity goes. So if you have multiple business pages, make sure you've selected the correct one. And then next we place our image. So you'll see a button that says something similar to add media. I'm going to go ahead and select add image. You could do an image or a video. And since this is a female template, I'm going to use something bright and fun and colorful. Below the template is going to be where you place your copy. So under primary text, I already have some copy from the portal that I edited. So I'm going to go ahead and pull that in. And paste it in there. Next, all you have to do is add in your website URL. So that's going to be the URL to your click funnels landing page. So copy this guy. Paste it. There we go. And then you can do a headline. Be creative and have fun with it. You could do the name of the challenge 42 day transformation. You could do something that shows urgency. So book your spot now. You could do something that shows a little bit of scarcity. You know, spots are filling up fast. You could do something that shows a little bit of fatigue. You could do something similar as well. So I'm going to have a little bit of attitude in this one. And I'm going to say best challenge in Tucson, which is where that address is. So you can see the ads starting to form here. We have our identity, our copy, our creative. And we have our description. So all we have left is this button right here, which is called the call to action. For the call to action, I would suggest using something a little bit stronger than learn more. Book now apply now sign up are all really good options. Now that I've created my first female template. I'm going to go ahead and back on out. And then on my sidebar, travel up to the ad set level. Once I'm on, once I'm up there, I'm going to go ahead and duplicate my template. I'm going to use the skeleton, so the template skeleton to create a male template. So sorry, my computer is loading a little slow. There we go. So from here, I'm going to rename it. The male template. Mobile. And then the only things that I need to change in my ad here is going to be the gender on my audience. So make sure to change that to men. And then the picture in the ad. So I'm just going to scroll through real quick and double check just to be safe that my settings all did transfer. Yes, travel down to the ad level. And instead of a smoothie image, I'm going to go ahead and transfer it out for a meal prep image. And I'm also going to rename my ad so that it makes more sense. So I'm going to call this male ad template. One thing that you'll notice is every once in a while, Facebook will request a ask if you would like to request a manual review. So I'm going to do this ad in particular. I'm going to do just that because it's telling me that I may reach fewer people because there's too much text in my image. But if I scroll down and I look at my image, there's absolutely no text. So we'll go ahead and request a manual review. And if a real person looks at this, they'll see that there's no text. So this is something that can happen every once in a while with Facebook. So kind of happy that it happened during this demo so you guys could see it. So from here, I'm going to go ahead and exit out. And I'm going to go back up to the ad set level. And now I have both a male and female template. So I want to create a total of 12 ad sets and each ad set is only going to contain one ad. So from here, you just need to create six male ads and you can use the duplicate button for that and six total female ads. And yet again, you can use the duplicate button. When you get to the ad level, do keep in mind here, let's go to the female one because for some reason Facebook is not liking that food image. So when you get to the ad level, make sure that you're not using the exact same creative and every single one. So I wouldn't do six female ads with a smoothie picture. I would at least change the images out on a few of them. So I might do, for example, three female ads with the colorful smoothie picture because it's not going to reach out to the same exact people in every single ad set. And then I might do my other three ads as a different picture or a video. But as you go through things, make sure that you are changing out your ad names so they say what they actually are. And then once you've created all 12 of your ad sets, then all you have to do is come up here and hit this review and publish button. And then you'll be launched. So congratulations. You have almost made it through quick launch and you are launched if you hit that button.
